ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(b:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(c:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p3 = (b)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver', rating: 9})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does Martin Scorsese’s directorial and acting roles in *Taxi Driver* compare with the film’s critical reception, and what insights might that suggest about his creative influence on the project?

cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie {title: "Taxi Driver"})
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m)
OPTIONAL MATCH (m)<-[:REVIEWED]-(r:Person)-[:WROTE]->(m)
RETURN
  p, m, [(p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m) | [(actor).name + " " + actor.roles} + [("Director")]] AS ActingRoles,       m, [(r)-[:WROTE]->(m) | [r.name + " " + r.summary + " " + r.rating}] AS CriticalReception
